response.justification: This candidate is fundamentally misaligned with the role's requirements. The resume shows only 6 months of C++ experience (National Instruments 2014-2015), which falls far short of the mandatory 5-10 year requirement. There is no demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle expertise, no Windows platform specialization, and zero financial services or capital markets domain knowledge. The candidate's recent career trajectory strongly favors web/interpreted languages and AI tooling rather than systems-level C++ development.
strengths: Excellent communication and teaching ability demonstrated through workshops, courses, and conference talks at major venues
Full-stack engineer with proven ability to rapidly acquire diverse technical skills across multiple languages and platforms
Recent mid-to-senior level experience at established companies with enterprise development practices (Optilyz, re:cinq)
concerns: Only 6 months of explicit C++ experience listed in 2014-2015, approximately 10+ years ago; mandatory 5-10 year requirement severely unmet
SQL listed in skills without context, detail, or evidence of SQL Server/Oracle expertise; mandatory requirement inadequately demonstrated
Zero experience in fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, investment banking, or financial services; critical domain gap
